Custom VBS Yard Signs for Church Promotion & Community Outreach

Custom VBS yard signs are the perfect promotional tool for churches looking to advertise their Vacation Bible School programs to the community. These lightweight, durable signs are designed for easy outdoor installation and deliver maximum visibility for passing cars and pedestrians.

Our custom VBS yard signs are digitally printed in full color on 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This weather-resistant material features hollow flutes that provide durability while keeping the signs lightweight and easy to handle. The corrugated plastic is waterproof and can withstand outdoor conditions throughout your VBS promotion period.

VBS Yard Sign Features

  • Full-color digital printing for vibrant VBS designs
  • 4mm corrugated plastic construction for durability
  • Waterproof and weather-resistant for outdoor display
  • Available in single-sided or double-sided printing
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and transport
  • Optional wire stakes available for ground installation

Important Note: All VBS yard signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Scoring involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire sign, allowing it to fold for optimal shipping while maintaining structural integrity.

VBS yard signs with different designs will be priced and processed as separate items per design. This ensures each unique VBS message or graphic receives proper attention during production.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Long-Lasting VBS Yard Sign Display

Our VBS yard signs are constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic, specifically chosen for church outdoor advertising applications. This material provides the ideal balance of durability, cost-effectiveness, and visual impact for VBS promotions.

Corrugated Plastic Specifications

  • Thickness: 4mm for optimal durability without excessive weight
  • Structure: Hollow fluted design runs horizontally on standard sheets
  • Color: Bright white base for excellent print contrast
  • Weather Resistance: Fully waterproof for outdoor VBS campaigns
  • Flexibility: Resistant to cracking and breaking during installation

Material Benefits for VBS Applications

The corrugated plastic construction makes these signs ideal for church VBS promotions because they can withstand various weather conditions while maintaining their professional appearance. The lightweight nature allows for easy repositioning throughout your VBS marketing campaign.

Sizing Note: All corrugated plastic VBS yard signs are trimmed 1/8" on each side during finishing. For example, an 18" x 24" sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75" when shipped. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 if precise measurements are required for your VBS installation.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Finishing Options for VBS Yard Sign Installation

Choose from professional finishing options designed to enhance your VBS yard sign's appearance and installation requirements.

Border Options

  • 1/2" White Margin: Clean white border around your VBS design
  • Full Bleed: VBS graphics extend completely to sign edges

Printing Options

  • Single-Sided: VBS design printed on front face only
  • Double-Sided: VBS graphics on both sides for maximum visibility

Installation Hardware

Wire installation stakes are available to add to your VBS yard sign order. These stakes provide secure ground mounting for both single and double-sided signs, ensuring your VBS promotion remains stable in outdoor conditions.

Scoring for Large VBS Signs

VBS yard signs exceeding 32" x 48" in any direction receive automatic scoring and folding. This process cuts through the top layer only, allowing the sign to fold for shipping while maintaining structural integrity for display.

Churches requiring flat shipping for large VBS signs can contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 or visit our oversized flat shipping options.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

VBS Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Plan your VBS promotion timeline with our reliable production schedules. All production times are calculated in business days and begin after artwork approval.

Rush Production Options

1 Business Day Priority

Fastest turnaround for urgent VBS promotions requiring immediate production.

2 Business Days Express

Quick turnaround option for time-sensitive VBS marketing campaigns.

Standard Production Times

3 Business Days Standard

Most popular option providing reliable timing for planned VBS promotions.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for VBS campaigns with flexible timing requirements.

Production Process

Your VBS yard sign production begins immediately after final artwork approval. Digital proofs are provided to ensure your VBS design meets expectations before printing begins.

Production times apply to business days (Monday through Friday) and do not include weekends or holidays. Shipping time is additional and varies based on your location and selected shipping method.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom VBS Yard Sign Orders

We offer flexible payment methods to accommodate church budgets and procurement processes for VBS yard sign orders.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal for secure online transactions
  • Church purchase orders (subject to credit approval)
  • Bank transfers for large VBS sign orders

Church Account Options

Churches can establish accounts for streamlined ordering of VBS materials and other signage throughout the year. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 to discuss account setup and terms.

Order Processing

Payment is processed upon order placement, with production beginning after both payment confirmation and final artwork approval. This ensures your VBS yard signs move quickly through our production schedule.

Bulk Order Discounts

Volume discounts may be available for large VBS yard sign orders. Contact our team for custom quotes on quantities exceeding standard pricing tiers.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom VBS Yard Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your VBS yard signs arrive on time for your church's promotional campaign.

Standard Shipping Methods

  • Ground Shipping: Cost-effective option for planned VBS promotions
  • Expedited Shipping: Faster delivery for time-sensitive VBS campaigns
  • Overnight Shipping: Next-day delivery for urgent VBS sign needs

VBS Yard Sign Packaging

Signs are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. Standard-sized VBS yard signs ship flat in protective packaging. Larger signs may be scored and folded for efficient shipping while maintaining display quality.

Shipping Zones and Transit Times

Shipping times vary based on your location relative to our production facility. Most VBS yard sign orders ship within 1-2 business days of production completion.

Order Tracking

Real-time tracking information is provided for all VBS yard sign shipments, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and plan your VBS campaign timeline accordingly.

Large Order Considerations

Bulk VBS yard sign orders may require freight shipping depending on quantity and total dimensions. Our customer service team will coordinate appropriate shipping methods for large church orders.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Church & Community Uses for VBS Yard Signs

VBS yard signs serve multiple promotional purposes for churches looking to maximize their Vacation Bible School outreach and community engagement.

Primary VBS Applications

  • Church Grounds: Position signs around church property to announce VBS dates and themes
  • Community Intersections: Place signs at high-traffic areas with proper permissions
  • Congregation Homes: Members display signs in front yards to spread VBS awareness
  • School Partnerships: Promote VBS programs near partner schools and community centers

VBS Campaign Strategies

  • Registration Reminders: Include registration deadlines and contact information
  • Theme Promotion: Showcase exciting VBS themes to attract children and families
  • Directional Signage: Guide families to church location during VBS week
  • Volunteer Recruitment: Advertise volunteer opportunities alongside VBS promotion

Installation Locations

VBS yard signs work effectively in front lawns, church parking lots, community bulletin areas, and other high-visibility locations where families frequent. The weather-resistant construction ensures signs maintain their professional appearance throughout extended outdoor display periods.

Multi-Use Benefits

Beyond VBS promotion, these signs can be repurposed for other church events, seasonal celebrations, and ongoing ministry announcements, providing excellent value for church marketing budgets.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for VBS Yard Sign Printing

Ensure your VBS yard signs print with professional quality by following our artwork specifications and design guidelines.

File Specifications

  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI at final print size
  • File Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, PSD, or high-resolution JPG/PNG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleeds: 0.125" bleed on all sides for full-bleed designs

Design Guidelines for VBS Signs

  • Text Size: Minimum 1" tall letters for roadside visibility
  • Font Selection: Bold, easy-to-read fonts work best for VBS messaging
  • Color Contrast: High contrast between text and background for maximum readability
  • Essential Information: Include VBS dates, times, church name, and contact details

Artwork Review Process

All VBS yard sign artwork receives professional review before production. Digital proofs are provided to ensure your design meets expectations and technical requirements.

Design Services Available

Our design team can create custom VBS yard sign artwork if you prefer professional design assistance. Upload reference materials and provide specific requirements for your VBS theme and messaging.

Color Matching

Our color match proof system ensures accurate reproduction of your church's brand colors and VBS theme colors throughout the printing process.

Make this year's VBS your most successful yet with custom yard signs that attract families and build excitement in your community.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

VBS Yard Sign FAQ

How durable are VBS yard signs for outdoor use?

Our VBS yard signs are made from waterproof 4mm corrugated plastic that withstands rain, wind, and sun exposure. They maintain their appearance throughout typical VBS campaign periods and can be stored for future church events.

What size VBS yard signs work best for roadside visibility?

18" x 24" and 24" x 36" are popular sizes for VBS yard signs, providing excellent visibility while remaining cost-effective. Larger sizes like 36" x 48" offer maximum impact for high-traffic locations.

Can I order different VBS designs in one order?

Yes, but each unique VBS design is priced and processed separately. This ensures proper attention to each design's specific requirements and color accuracy.

Do large VBS yard signs get folded for shipping?

Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. The scoring process doesn't damage the sign - it simply allows folding while maintaining structural integrity for display.

Are installation stakes included with VBS yard signs?

Wire installation stakes are available as an add-on option during ordering. These stakes work with both single and double-sided VBS yard signs for secure ground installation.

How far in advance should I order VBS yard signs?

We recommend ordering 2-3 weeks before your VBS starts to allow time for design, production, and delivery. Rush options are available if you need signs sooner.

Can VBS yard signs be reused for next year?

Yes, our corrugated plastic construction is durable enough for multiple uses. Store signs in a dry location between VBS seasons to maintain their quality and appearance.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
